question: Based on the percentage labels shown in the chart, which statement is correct?

options.A: Support has a higher value than Quality.
options.B: Other has the lowest value among all the categories.
options.C: Design has the highest value among all the categories.
options.D: Quality and Price have the same value.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
